description:
⚠️ DESTRUCTIVE - Confirm with user before calling. Marks a blocked column for deletion from your destination table. The column will be dropped during the next sync.

For the NetSuite SuiteAnalytics and Salesforce and Salesforce Sandbox connectors, the 'schemas' map field will always have a single entry with the 'netsuite' or 'salesforce' key, respectively.

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the connection. Retrieve it from the `id` field in the [List All Connections](https://fivetran.com/docs/rest-api/api-reference/connections/list-connections) response, or from the `id` field returned when you [Create a Connection](https://fivetran.com/docs/rest-api/api-reference/connections/create-connection).

parameters.name: schemaName
parameters.description: The schema name as stored in the connection schema config. This value is case-sensitive; an incorrect case results in an HTTP 404 error.

parameters.name: tableName
parameters.description: The table name as stored in the connection schema config. This value is case-sensitive; an incorrect case results in an HTTP 404 error.

parameters.name: columnName
parameters.description: The column name as stored in the connection schema config. This value is case-sensitive; an incorrect case results in an HTTP 404 error.
